results.title: Islamic Cultural Center continues lecture series at schools
results.description:
DOHA: The Sheikh Abdulla Bin Zaid Al Mahmoud Islamic Cultural Center delivered a lecture on “Dealing with Difficulties,” attended by 240 male and female students at Podar Pearl School.

With the participation of 240 students from various educational levels, the center organised the lecture as part of its school visits programme, which aims to engage in dialogue with students and introduce them to positive behavioural values.

The students actively interacted with the lecture, which addressed how to deal with life’s challenges, ways to overcome them, and the reasons behind such difficulties.

It also emphasised the importance of responding to both ease and hardship with awareness and wisdom, and of adhering to faith and moral values, as these form the foundation of psychological resilience under different circumstances.

The school administration expressed its gratitude to the Ministry of Awqaf and Islamic Affairs and to the Sheikh Abdulla Bin Zaid Al Mahmoud Islamic Cultural Center for organising the lecture, which left a lasting impression on the students.

results.title: DJ Pumma, Influential New York-Based Korean DJ, Dies of Cancer at 46
results.description: New York-based South Korean artist DJ Pumma has died at the age of 46 following a courageous battle with cancer, according to an announcement on her social media channels. Known for her open-format style, she built a distinct career in the city's music scene with notable performances on Sway in the Morning and collaborations with global brands.
